structured_payload_candidate.title: Heating Zone State First Stage: Discharge Temperature Reset
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Series Fan-Powered Terminal Unit – Variable-Volume Fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: From 0% to 50% heating loop output, reset discharge temperature setpoint from current AHU SAT to a maximum of MaxΔT above space temperature setpoint. Primary airflow setpoint is minimum endpoint; series fan airflow setpoint is OA-min.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone State is Heating and Heating Loop output 0% to 50%
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Discharge temperature setpoint reset from current AHU SAT to max of MaxΔT above space temperature setpoint. Primary airflow setpoint = minimum endpoint. Series fan airflow setpoint = OA-min.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: a. From 0% to 50%, the Heating Loop output shall reset the discharge temperature setpoint from the current AHU SAT setpoint to a maximum of MaxΔT above space temperature setpoint. The primary airflow setpoint shall be the minimum endpoint, and the series fan airflow setpoint shall be OA-min.
